name: @marius-patrik/agentos
description: Agentos workspace with a Bun TypeScript agent manager and shared CLI state.

scripts.test: bun test agent-manager/test/gitmodules.test.ts agent-manager/test/adapters.test.ts agent-manager/test/packages.test.ts agent-manager/test/data-repos.test.ts agent-manager/test/harness-cli.test.ts agent-manager/test/secrets.test.ts
scripts.ci: bun run check && bun run test
